name: Boston Dynamics Spot
short_description: A quadruped robot for inspection and data capture in industrial environments.
long_description: A four-legged mobile robot that navigates stairs, rough terrain, and industrial sites carrying sensor payloads. Its animal-like-but-clearly-machine form lands between creature and tool, which shapes how people interpret its presence on a worksite.

images.caption: Boston Dynamics Spot quadruped robot.
images.alt_text: A yellow-and-black Boston Dynamics Spot quadruped robot standing on its four articulated legs.

sources.title: Spot
sources.access_notes: Official product page; commercial availability from 2020.
